hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qw 'git commit' && { cd /home/zichuan/.openclaw/workspace/llm-adapter && [ ! -f Cargo.toml ] && exit 0; RESULT=$(cargo test --workspace 2>&1); RC=$?; echo "$RESULT" | tail -30; [ $RC -ne 0 ] && exit 2 || exit 0; } || exit 0

PreToolUse.description: All workspace tests must pass before git commit

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); [ "$(echo $INPUT | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = 'true' ] && exit 0; cd /home/zichuan/.openclaw/workspace/llm-adapter && [ ! -f Cargo.toml ] && exit 0; RESULT=$(cargo build --workspace 2>&1); RC=$?; echo "$RESULT" | tail -15; [ $RC -ne 0 ] && exit 2 || exit 0

Stop.description: Workspace must build before agent stops
